title: Ameesa Darys

'''Ameesa Darys''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] Inquisitor of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]]. Formerly a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] she followed in the footsteps of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who trained her as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]], in betraying the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] and joining the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==Biography==
After being identified as [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age, Ameesa Darys was taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] and inducted into the [[Jedi academy|academy]] housed within. After years of training, Darys [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] and was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]]. The two traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] together on missions for many years before she was ready to take her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]; which she passed. Made a Jedi Knight herself, Darys continued to study independently of her master, taking on the role of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TEP" /><ref name="The Dark Forces Saga">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050616a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 6: Outcasts and Megalomaniacs Welcome}}</ref>

At the end of the Clone Wars in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Darys managed to escape [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], the [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency Order]] used to wipe out the Jedi Order by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]. Instead of fleeing from the newly formed and Sith controlled [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Darys followed in her former master's footsteps and joined the Empire, disavowing her Jedi heritage and falling to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. Becoming a member of the Imperial [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]], Inquisitor Darys hunted down her brother and sister Jedi per the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] orders. While making a sweep over [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] during the hunt for Jedi Master [[Plett]], Darys' agents captured the young [[Lagan Ismaren|Lagan]] and [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]] after the siblings had evacuated the planet with the so-called [[Children of the Jedi]]. When they were brought before Darys, the ruthless Inquisitor ignited her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in Lagan's heart and let him die before his sister's eyes. Playing on this, Darys was able to turn the horrified Roganda Ismaren to the dark side.<ref name="TEP" />

In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]],<ref name="Warfare" /> Inquisitor Darys joined [[Grand Inquisitor/Legends|Grand Inquisitor]] [[Laddinare Torbin|Torbin]] and Inquisitor [[Antinnis Tremayne]] in the hunt for the recently discovered [[Arden Lyn]], an ancient threat reawakened from a millennia long slumber. When the team tracked Lyn down, the powerful Force-wielder seriously injured Tremayne and killed Darys before Torbin was able to [[Sai cha/Legends|remove]] Lyn's right arm with his lightsaber and disarm her.<ref name="TEP" />

==Behind the scenes==
Though created in [[Abel G. Peña]]'s debut article "[[The Emperor's Pawns]]," Peña, did not create the character's name;<ref name="JCF1">{{JCFCite|url=posts/26461070|board=Literature|thread=The Emperor's Pawns article (was: Gamer #5 stuff @ TOS!!!)|user=[[Abel G. Peña|Halagad Ventor]]|date=2007-03-30|time=2:45 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801195123/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-emperors-pawns-article-was-gamer-5-stuff-tos.3223225/page-19}}</ref> it originated in editing, apparently in reference to the name of comedian [[Amy Sedaris]].<ref name="JCF2">{{JCFCite|url=posts/23364317|board=Literature|thread=Daily Hyperspace SW Comic Strip Adventures Discussion-"Rookies" & "Evasive Action: End Game"|user=[[Pablo Hidalgo|Pabawan]]|date=2006-03-08|time=8:56 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200328171716/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/daily-hyperspace-sw-comic-strip-adventures-discussion-rookies-evasive-action-end-game.16431027/page-26}}</ref> Originally, Peña thought Darys to be a male, but he later changed his mind for later articles in order for the character to better serve as a counterpart to Jerec's master, [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]].<ref name="JCF1" />
